name: Logistic Regression
description: Logistic Regression is a probability-based classification algorithm used to predict binary outcomes in a clear and interpretable manner.
input: This takes in a DataFrame and performs Logistic Regression classification
output: The trained Logistic Regression model is passed to downstream nodes along with the original input DataFrame

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing all input features used by the model to estimate outcome probabilities.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the actual binary business outcome the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the column where predicted class labels are written after model scoring.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls how the dataset is divided between training and validation to assess model generalization.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Maximum Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of optimization iterations used to converge on model parameters.

fields.name: fitIntercept
fields.title: Fit Intercept
fields.description: Specifies whether the model includes an intercept term to shift the decision boundary.

fields.name: regParam
fields.title: Regularization Param
fields.description: Controls the strength of regularization to prevent overfitting by penalizing large coefficients.

fields.name: standardization
fields.title: Standardization
fields.description: Determines whether features are standardized before training to improve convergence.

fields.name: threshold
fields.title: Threshold
fields.description: Probability cutoff used to convert predicted probabilities into binary class labels.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tolerance
fields.description: Convergence tolerance that determines when the optimization process should stop.

fields.name: elasticNetParam
fields.title: ElasticNet Param
fields.description: Controls the balance between L1 and L2 regularization, affecting sparsity and stability.

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Optional column defining the relative importance of records during model training.

fields.name: aggregationDepth
fields.title: Aggregation Depth
fields.description: Controls aggregation depth during distributed optimization to balance performance and memory usage.

fields.name: family
fields.title: Family
fields.description: Specifies the probability distribution used to model the label values.

fields.name: regParamGrid
fields.title: Regularization Param Grid Search
fields.description: Set of regularization values evaluated during hyperparameter tuning.

fields.name: elasticNetGrid
fields.title: ElasticNet Param Grid Search
fields.description: Candidate ElasticNet parameter values tested to optimize model sparsity.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enables visualization of classification outcomes across predicted and actual classes.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Business explanation describing correct predictions and misclassifications.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing record counts per outcome.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing record counts per outcome.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Business interpretation of true positives, false positives, and false negatives.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enables ROC curve visualization to assess classification performance.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Explains how effectively the model distinguishes between positive and negative outcomes.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis representing the false positive rate.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis representing the true positive rate.
